item.title: I'm Just a Bill: IRS Direct File Expansion
item.description:
👀 IRS Direct File Expansion

IRS Direct File codification + expansion 119th Congress: free federal tax filing tool · state-tax integration · cooperative-class member-account integration. Composes with EITC Expansion + Child Tax Credit + Open Letter to IRS. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
